description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.12-alpine Docker image. Define a test stage with a test job that runs on non‑default branches (rule $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME != $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH), executes apk update && apk add make, then pip install -r requirements.txt and make publish. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the default branch (rule $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH), runs apk add --update --no-cache make subversion, pip install -r requirements.txt, and make publish, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
